text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At Rice Shower's request, we keep training up
until the very last minute of summer camp.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Hurry up, Rice! The bus is waiting for you!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Ehehe... Thank goodness I made it.
choice_data_list: We're lucky that everyone waited for you.
We're lucky that everyone waited for you.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Right! I'll have to thank them...

text_block_list.name: Bus Driver
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, everyone! It looks like the road ahead
closed only a minute ago.

text_block_list.name: Bus Driver
text_block_list.text:
It may take us an additional two hours to return
to campus.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I-I'm sorry! It's all my fault!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower is almost inconsolable for the rest of
the trip. She even goes to apologize to everyone
on the bus personally.
